business_definition: Represents a digital or physical insurance document managed by the platform.
remarks: Root aggregate of the Documents domain.

business_definition: Represents descriptive metadata associated with a document.
Represents extracted textual information from document images.
Represents business and technical validation of documents.
Represents relationships between documents and business entities.
Represents version history of a document.
Represents operational workflow of the document.
Represents AI-generated quality assessment and document intelligence.
